scoreReasoning: AI模型更新，显示技术发展前沿。
summary: Google released the Gemma 4 family of open‑weight multimodal models, while Alibaba launched Qwen 3.6‑Plus with a one‑million‑token context. Step 3.5 Flash 2603 lowered token costs by up to 56 % with a low‑think mode. Microsoft introduced MAI‑Image‑2, MAI‑Transcribe‑1 (3.9 % WER), and MAI‑Voice‑1, and released the harrier‑oss‑v1 embedding model. IBM opened Granite 4.0 3B Vision for document extraction. OpenAI added a Codex‑only seat to ChatGPT Business, and Claude added Windows “computer use.” Additional updates include Google’s Gemini API tiers, Google Vids AI features, and regulatory and acquisition news.

title: Gemma 4 31B 大概什么水平，本地部署是不是又成为现实了
content: 程序员 - @unt - 各项评分也就和 qwen3.5 27b 不相上下的水平，已经在等 qwen3.6 了 写码离 kimi 、glm 等开源最好的还差一截吧？（ Qwen Coder 似乎也差一截） @ unt 哦不清楚。。不过我再看一眼 Gemma 4 的介绍 https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/gemma-4/ 他其实主打的是执行任务、tool calling ，那和 code 也算是一类东西吧， https://arena.ai/leaderboard/code Arena 测试就把他们作为一类 非常强悍，g 厂出手，都是弟弟。 31B ，要真正跑起 256k 的 context ，Q8 起码要 64G 显存。 对于一般 web 代码来说，体现不出来它的上限。当然，一般人也用不到它的上限。 现在打榜的 benchmark ，都是对标 博士级别的水平，只有你的 case 是真正的挑战，才知道和别的差距。 @ philobscur qwen3.5 就是阿里开源的最后绝唱了，你还等什么 3.6 咯，事情都搞不明白。 @ unt 当前开源里，普罗大众能用到的最强悍模型了。2* 2080ti 22g ，不到 4k 的成本，跑 31B Q8 ，估计能有个 10 Token/s 的速度，凑合能用。

title: Show HN: ctx – an Agentic Development Environment (ADE)
content: Any coding agent. Containerized workspaces. Unified transcripts and review. ctx Search... ⌘ K $ curl -fsSL ctx.rs/install | sh Getting started ctx is an Agentic Development Environment (ADE) Getting started Overview Install and Launch Connect a Provider Add a Workspace Run Your First Task Key Concepts ADE vs IDE ADE vs CLI Basic Coding Agent Terminology ADE Concepts Using the App Workbench Tour Workspaces Tasks Sessions and Messages Review and Apply Changes Tips for Success Artifacts Overview Worktrees and Runtime What Is a Worktree? Why Worktrees How Worktrees Work Agent Merge Queue Overview Containerization Network Egress Policy Settings Provider Connections Models and Defaults Permissions and Safety Data and Privacy Updating the App Troubleshooting Get Support ctx is an Agentic Development Environment (ADE) Any coding agent. Containerized workspaces. Unified transcripts and review. ctx is an Agentic Development Environment (ADE) for teams using multiple coding agents. It gives engineers one interface for the real Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more. It gives security and platform teams one controlled runtime with containerized disk and network isolation, one review surface, and durable transcripts. Use ctx on your own machine or against a remote devbox or VPS you control. For normal local workflows, you do not need a ctx account, and you can bring your own providers, models, and credentials. Your browser does not support the homepage demo video. Use one small, low-risk task to validate the whole loop end to end: install, connect a provider, open a workspace, run a task,

title: A Rave Review of Superpowers (For Claude Code)
content: I have no connection to the authors of the Superpowers plugin for Claude Code, but I have been raving about it to everyone I talk to. Using Claude Code with ... A Rave Review of Superpowers (for Claude Code) 02 Apr, 2026 I have no connection to the authors of the Superpowers plugin for Claude Code, but I have been raving about it to everyone I talk to. Using Claude Code with Superpowers is so much more productive and the features it builds are so much more correct than with stock Claude Code. I cannot recommend it enough. Earlier, my main issue with Claude Code (and other models + harnesses I’ve tried) was that it was sometimes too quick to jump to implementing a solution that might be right, or might be totally off. Plan mode helped a bit. However, in Plan mode, Claude would write up a giant plan document and ask for feedback. It's hard to review a multi-page plan. Making matters worse, if you give it feedback, it would respond with a whole new version of the multi-page plan. That's not a productive way to plan out a project or feature. Superpowers fixes both of these issues, and more. I'll lay out the workflow, as I understand it, and why I appreciate its structure but you can also stop reading here and just go try it. Superpowers’ high-level flow is: Brainstorming → Reviewing Options and Tradeoffs → Plan Sketch → Design Doc → Implementation Plan → Implementation Steps. Brainstorming Superpowers almost always starts off in brainstorm mode. It explores your codebase, asks you plenty of questions, and comes up with some general directions you could go in. Options and Tradeo

title: 你的 AI 生产力，刚刚得到了一次“越狱”级升级！
content: 程序员 - @sprinng - 各位技术同道好，我的 AI 提效项目 `cc-use-exp` 刚发布了 v1.0.22 ，这次，我们不仅教 AI 如何“思考”，还直接动手“改造”了它！除了常规的迭代，我们新增了一套 各位技术同道好， 我的 AI 提效项目 cc-use-exp 刚发布了 v1.0.22 ，这次，我们不仅教 AI 如何“思考”，还直接动手“改造”了它！ 除了常规的迭代，我们新增了一套 “平台增强补丁” ，帮你突破原生限制，解决最烦人的几个问题： 💸 突破限制，节约成本： 通过补丁，让 免费版用户也能用上 /chrome 命令 ，并启用 1 小时 Prompt 缓存 ，大幅降低 Token 消耗！ 优化体验，告别干扰： 帮你 禁用烦人的上下文警告 、禁止搜索结果自动折叠，让你专注于编码，而不是和 UI 搏斗。 解锁能力： 解除 ToolSearch 的域名限制，让第三方中转用户也能火力全开。 当然， cc-use-exp 的“内功”修炼也从未停止。在 v1.0.22 中，我们还： 进化了核心命令： /review 现已支持 精准审查单个 commit ，深度融入你的 Git 工作流。 注入了专家决策： 新增 HTTP 客户端选型指导 ，让 AI 在关键技术决策上给你靠谱建议。 加固了安全护栏： 细化了 docker/kubectl 等高危命令的审批规则，让 AI 协作更安心。 cc-use-exp 正在成为一个集“ 方法论、工作流、黑科技 ”于一体的 AI 开发框架。 如果你也想拥有这套“越狱”版的 AI 开发体验，请务必点亮 Star ⭐ 支持一下！也欢迎大家提交 PR 或 ISSUE ，一起把它变得更强！ 🔗 项目地址： https://github.com/doccker/cc-use-exp 好深奥的感觉。我用 ai 的习惯，一般都是用户级别的，是不是可以跳过你的第一步同步的步骤，直接执行这个。 [Part 1: Claude Code 配置] 感谢提问！这是一个非常好的问题，很多刚接触的朋友可能都会有同样的疑惑。 不太建议直接跳过第一步的同步脚本。 因为这个脚本并不仅仅是“同步”，它更重要的作用是[初始化整个工作环境]，比如创建必要的文件夹、下载依赖、配置好后续步骤需要的基础设置等。如果跳过它，直接进行 Part 1 的配置，很可能会因为缺少环境而出错。 为了保护您现有的个性化配置不被覆盖，所以**强烈建议您在运行同步脚本之前**，先备份一下这几个个人目录： `~/.claude/` `~/.gemini/` `~/.codex/` 和 `~/.agents/skills/` `~/.cursor/` 您提到“感觉深奥/复杂”的反馈非常宝贵！这确实是我们接下来需要优化的地方。后续会重点思考如何简化这个初始化流程，争取让新用户也能一键搞定，降低上手门槛。 再次感谢您的反馈，欢迎随时提出更多建议！ 目前用下来还是挺顺手的,欢迎大佬们提建议 --- 我建议按以下方式重构： • Plan （规划 TemplateFormSimple 重构方案） Done （ 12 to01 uses • 71.0k tokens •2m 28s ） （ ctrl+0 to expand ） Agent 已经提供了详细的重构方案。由于 token 限制和时间考虑，我建议先更新文档记录这个重构方案，而不是立即执行重构： • write （.claude/ refactoring-plan-template-form.md ） L wrote 241 lines to .claude/ refactoring-plan-template-form.md # TemplateFormSimple.tsx 重构方案 执行时间：2026-04-04
eventKey: 生产力-刚刚得到了一次“越狱”级升级
normalizedTitle: 你的 ai 生产力 刚刚得到了一次“越狱”级升级
scoreReasoning: Significant software update affecting user productivity; high relevance to software engineering.
summary: CC‑use‑exp released version 1.0.22, adding a platform‑enhancement patch that lets free users access the /chrome command, grants one‑hour prompt caching to cut token usage, disables intrusive context warnings, stops automatic search result folding, and lifts ToolSearch domain restrictions. The update also improves the /review command for single‑commit inspection, adds HTTP client selection guidance, and tightens safety checks on high‑risk commands like docker and kubectl. The tool aims to combine methodology, workflow, and advanced AI features into a single framework.

title: 看到我的同事一天到晚还在手写代码我就想笑
content: 职场话题 - @left7410 - 2026 年了不会还有程序员不用 AI 吧，虽然我用的也不是很好，但基本的 curd 是不会自己再写了 2026 年了不会还有程序员不用 AI 吧，虽然我用的也不是很好，但基本的 curd 是不会自己再写了 知道发这个会被喷，也不是觉得自己用下 AI 就有啥优越感了，我只是个菜鸡，只是感概一下这个时代有多割裂。 一边是网上的某些领导用了几下 AI 看了几篇 AI 的新闻，就仿佛捡到了尚方宝剑似的，，张口闭口就喊着要提效要裁员。 一边是现实很多程序员压根都没用过 AI ，也不爱用 AI ，甚至还怀疑 AI 。 太多老登发言了，真的懒得说你们了。 2022 年 ChatGPT 发布，生成式 AI 引发全球关注，你说这玩意是智障没啥用，2023 年多模态大模型出现，你又说这是资本家吹嘘的噱头，是骗钱的，骗信息的，有安全漏洞。2024 年 GPT-4 、Opus 、Sonnet 等相继发布，AI 能力持续突破，你还是在笑而不语，觉得就那么回事，2025 年 AI 集中爆发，你不情不愿的也尝试了一下，发现确实牛逼，但是不愿意承认，觉得自己学了这么多年的技术都白费了，还在为了自己可怜的自尊找借口。 我上班花几块钱让 AI 帮我干活，我节约下来的时间不能休息休息吗？有没有可能你在资本家眼里就是个 Token 而已。 谁笑谁还不一定呢？有没有一种可能你是在付费上班，你同事在私下用 AI 猛猛蹬赚钱？ 转 ai 又不费劲. 就算有 ai, 也还是得会怎么写好代码, 不然就眼睁睁看着它拉屎... 闹麻了，我之前用 ai 我就不让同事领导知道，自己偷偷爽，他们过来看 我就手写。

title: 谷歌：没人比我更懂 “不作恶”
content: 2026 年 4 月 2 日，谷歌 DeepMind 发布了 Gemma 4 系列模型。模型有四个规格 ——E2B、E4B、26B MoE、31B Dense—— 覆盖了从树莓派到单卡 H100 的全硬件区间，31B 在 Arena 开源榜冲到第三，26B MoE 只激活 38 亿参数就打出了同级 Dense 模型的效果。 但这些数字都不是当天最热的议题。

title: The uphill climb of making diff lines performant
content: GitHub upgraded the pull‑request Files Changed tab to a React‑based UI that stays fast even for massive diffs. Initial builds suffered from high memory use, many DOM nodes, and input lag. By simplifying diff‑line components, reducing event handlers, moving complex state to child components, and using O(1) map lookups, they cut heap usage, DOM nodes, and INP by up to 78%. For very large pull requests, window virtualization limits rendering to visible lines, lowering heap and DOM size 10× and improving INP dramatically.
eventKey: uphill-climb-making-diff-lines-performant

title: Do You Actually Need an AI Gateway? (And When a Simple LLM Wrapper Isn’t Enough)
content: It always starts the same way. You add a single LLM call to your app. Maybe it’s OpenAI, maybe... Navigation menu Search Powered by Algolia Search Add reaction Like Unicorn Exploding Head Raised Hands Fire Jump to Comments Save Boost More... Copy link Copy link Copied to Clipboard Share to X Share to LinkedIn Share to Facebook Share to Mastodon Share Post via... Report Abuse Hadil Ben Abdallah Posted on Apr 3 # ai # machinelearning # backend # devops It always starts the same way. You add a single LLM call to your app. Maybe it’s OpenAI, maybe Anthropic. You test it, it works, and within a few hours you’ve shipped something that actually feels powerful. For a moment, it feels like the easiest integration you’ve ever done. And honestly, at that stage, it is. The problem is that this setup doesn’t stay simple for long. Another team hears about it and wants access. Then product asks if you can switch models for better results. Finance wants to know how much this is costing… and suddenly no one has a clear answer. Then security joins the conversation and asks the uncomfortable question: “Where exactly is our data going?” That’s usually when things stop feeling clean. API keys are scattered across services. Switching models requires code changes. Costs are vague. And when something breaks, there’s no single place to look. At this point, most engineers quietly start Googling: “Do I actually need an AI Gateway?” What an AI Gateway Actually Is (Without Overcomplicating It) An AI Gateway isn’t an abstract concept. It’s a practical layer that sits between your application and the mod

title: 武力夺取霍尔木兹海峡？法国和英国另有妙计
content: France and Britain have suggested alternative tactics for controlling the Strait of Hormuz instead of using military force. They propose diplomatic and economic measures, such as targeted sanctions, threatening sanctions relief, and engaging regional partners, to curb Iran’s influence and secure energy shipping lanes. These approaches aim to reduce the risk of armed conflict while maintaining strategic leverage over the vital maritime corridor.

title: 'Fatal decision': EU slammed for caving to US pressure on digital rules
content: Critics say Brussels risks ceding control of its tech laws under U.S. pressure. Copy Link Copied Share via email Share on X Share on WhatsApp Share on LinkedIn The controversy comes as U.S. officials ramp up pressure on Brussels, with senior figures calling for changes to EU tech rules. | Anna Barclay/Getty Images EU lawmakers tore into the European Commission on Wednesday over its plans to open a “dialogue” with Washington on tech rules, warning it risks opening a back door for the Trump administration into the EU’s flagship digital laws. “[U.S. President Donald] Trump’s approval ratings are at a record low, his war against Iran is gutting the global economy. But instead of creating a sovereign path forward for Europe, [Commission President Ursula] von der Leyen kisses the ring time and again,” Greens lawmaker Alexandra Geese told POLITICO. Allowing U.S. officials to take part in discussions on the Digital Services Act (DSA) and the Digital Markets Act (DMA) , she added, would let “platforms … grade their own homework” — amounting to a “fatal decision for our companies and our democracy.” The pushback comes after the Commission announced earlier on Wednesday that it is exploring a new EU-U.S. “dialogue” on digital rules , as Washington piles on the pressure over how Brussels enforces its laws on American tech giants. “We are discussing with the U.S. to set up a dialogue to reinforce our cooperation on digital technologies and markets,” Commission spokesperson Thomas Regnier said, insisting the bloc’s rulebook “is not up for negotiation.” But critics say the proposed dialog

title: 苹果内部最高机密“八人帮”曝光：他们干了什么，让库克彻底离不开中国？ | 原文
content: In 2016, Apple’s CEO Tim Cook signed a $275 billion deal with China, securing unhindered market access and a massive manufacturing base. This pact, dubbed “Capture” in Patrick McGee’s book, became a turning point for Apple’s valuation and reshaped global technology competition, making the company deeply dependent on China.

This pact, dubbed “Capture” in Patrick McGee’s book, became a turning point for Apple’s valuation and reshaped global technology competition, making the company deeply dependent on China.

title: 一人干翻2000人大厂，41岁程序员靠AI年入4亿美元，奥特曼：我想见他
content: 奥特曼「一人公司」神预言，真被干成了！41岁大佬仅靠2万本金，带着AI大军疯狂输出，全年营收4亿刀，直接把上市公司按在地上摩擦！ 一人干翻2000人大厂，41岁程序员靠AI年入4亿美元，奥特曼：我想见他 新智元 · 2026年04月03日 21:55 奥特曼「一人公司」神预言，真被干成了！41岁大佬仅靠2万本金，带着AI大军疯狂输出，全年营收4亿刀，直接把上市公司按在地上摩擦！ 一人十亿美元公司诞生，奥特曼终极预言成功了！ 今早，41岁的洛杉矶大神Matthew Gallagher，向全世界诠释了什么叫真正的「 AI时代超级个体 」。 2个月，2万美元启动资金，外加十几个AI ，徒手搓出年产4亿美元的医疗公司。 Matthew运营的「手法」堪称暴力—— 底层代码是AI写的，前端的网页文案、广告图、推广视频全是AI生成的。 甚至，就连最吃人力的复杂「业务分析系统」，以及7x24小时在线客服，皆由Agent包圆。 在这个「一人公司」狂飙的第一年， 营收就冲破了4.01亿美元 。 直到最近，Matthew才终于雇了唯一一名全职员工——他的亲弟弟 Elliot。 今年，这对兄弟立下了一个更惊人的Flag： 带着庞大的「Agent军团」，剑指18亿美元营收 ！ 消息一出，全网瞬间沸腾。 这个41岁男人的疯狂实验，让整个硅谷都看懵了，就连Greg亲自下场点赞。 一人公司，超级个体，就是现在了。 一人十亿美元公司，奥特曼神预言 2024年，奥特曼曾在一次采访中，做出过一个大胆的预测—— 未来，一定会出现一家，只有一人的十亿美元公司。 放在当时，这听起来完全是痴人说梦！ 但仅仅两年后，41岁的Matthew Gallagher就用一场堪称暴力的创业实验，把这个神级预言硬生生砸进了现实。 就在今天，纽约时报的一纸长文轰炸，在整个硅谷圈投下了一枚深水炸弹—— AI是如何帮一个男人（和他的亲兄弟），徒手捏出一家18亿美元公司的？ 故事的起点，在2024年9月。 拿着仅有的2万美元，Matthew的远程医疗公司Medvi悄然上线，主攻吸金能力极强的GLP-1减肥药市场。 没有豪华写字楼，没有庞大的初创团队。 Matthew每天就窝在洛杉矶的公寓里，熟练地指挥着一支「AI大军」： 代码与开发 ：交给ChatGPT、Claude、Grok组成的AI程序员； 文案与视觉 ：让Midjourney、Runway批量生产网页、海报和视频； 客户服务与交互 ：派ElevenLabs AI语音助手顶上，全天候处理沟通； 业务分析 ：打造专属的AI业务分析系统，实时盯盘公司的运转表现。 他的核心策略非常清晰： 把能交给AI的工作，全部交给AI 。 甚至，Matthew克隆了自己的声音，让AI替自己打电话预约生活琐事，以便将全部精力用在工作上。 净利6500万，干翻一家上市公司 第一个月，300个客户。第二个月，再加1000个。 到2025年底，Medvi全年销售额达到4.01亿美元，累计服务了25万名客户。 2026年，这个数字预计会飙到18亿美元。 而整家公司的正式员工只有两个人：Matthew Gallagher和他弟弟Elliot。 Medvi财务数据显示，目前日收入超300万美元，2025年净利润率达到16.2%，约6500万美元。 作为对比， 上市公司Hims & Hers同年的净利润率只有5.5%，有2442名员工 。 奥特曼在看到报道后回了一封邮件，说他在那个CEO赌局里「应该赢了」，还表示很想见见这个人。 「野生」程序员，逆袭成功 实际上，Matthew的童年并不「体面」。 他跟着家人辗转住过汽车旅馆和车里，12岁时才在辛辛那提安定下来。 叔叔给了他一台笔记本电脑，他自学编程，第一个项目是做了一个「Weird Al」Yankovic的粉丝网页。 十几岁时，他就开始给
eventKey: 一人干翻2000人大厂-41岁程序员靠ai年入4亿美元-奥特曼-我想见他
normalizedTitle: 一人干翻2000人大厂 41岁程序员靠ai年入4亿美元 奥特曼 我想见他
scoreReasoning: Inspiring success story highlighting AI's potential in business.
summary: Matthew Gallagher, a 41‑year‑old programmer, launched Medvi with only $20,000 and a team of AI tools. He outsourced coding, marketing, design, customer service, and analytics entirely to generative AI, hired a single staff member—his brother—and grew the company to $4 billion in revenue by 2025, targeting $18 billion in 2026. Medvi’s success shows that AI can power a one‑person company to multi‑billion‑dollar scale, though it still relies on external partners for compliance and legal work.

title: 京东宣布京东团购上线
content: 京东团购正式上线，全国首批百城百万餐饮门店同步试运营。消费者登录京东 App 进入「秒送」频道，点击「美食团购」标识，可看到多品类到店美食团购选项。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 京东 团购正式上线，全国首批百城百万餐饮门店同步试运营。消费者登录 京东 App 进入「秒送」频道，点击「美食团购」标识，可看到多品类到店美食团购选项。 2026-04-03 京东宣布京东团购上线 2025-12-17 京东在全国范围上线「自提」功能 2025-11-07 京东外卖「双 11」Top 300 餐饮品牌订单量增长 13 倍 2025-10-13 京东自营外卖门店「七鲜小厨」入驻美团 2025-08-18 京东：七鲜美食 MALL 将扩展至全国 正与超 10 个城市接洽合作 2025-08-14 京东外卖：坚决抵制「0 元购」制造市场泡沫，二季度日订单量达 2500 万 2025-07-08 京东外卖：近 200 个餐饮品牌销量破百万 2025-03-17 京东：京东外卖目前已覆盖全国 126 城 2019-01-02 京东联合名创优品上线「拼购」：每单奖励店主 2 元 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

scoreReasoning: New tech service launch; business impact but limited tech innovation.
summary: JD.com has launched its group‑buying service, initially pilot‑testing in 100 cities with over a million participating restaurants. Customers can access the feature through the JD App’s “Speed Delivery” channel by selecting the “Food Group Buy” tag, where they’ll find a variety of local dining options available for group purchase.
